name: Star Fall
description: Gwiazdy losowo pojawiają się na klawiszach i powoli gasną.
code:
speed = params.get('speed', 0.02)
brightness = params.get('brightness', 1.0)
color = params.get('color', [255, 255, 255])
rainbow = params.get('rainbow', False)
density = params.get('density', 0.25)
twinkle = params.get('twinkle', False)
random_colors = params.get('random_colors', False)

for key_name, virtual_id in key_map.items():
    base = virtual_id * 3
    if base + 2 >= 384:
        continue
    phase = (virtual_id * 2654435761) % 100000 / 100000.0
    cycle = (t * speed * 3.0 + phase) % 1.0
    if cycle < density:
        star_b = (1.0 - cycle / density) ** 2 * brightness
        if twinkle:
            tw = (math.sin(t * 20.0 + phase * 100.0) + 1) / 2
            star_b = star_b * (0.5 + 0.5 * tw)
    else:
        star_b = 0.0
        
    if star_b < 0.01:
        matrix[base] = 0
        matrix[base+1] = 0
        matrix[base+2] = 0
        continue
        
    if rainbow:
        hue = phase
        r, g, b = colorsys.hsv_to_rgb(hue, 1.0, star_b)
    else:
        if random_colors:
            base_hsv = colorsys.rgb_to_hsv(color[0]/255.0, color[1]/255.0, color[2]/255.0)
            shifted_hue = (base_hsv[0] + (phase - 0.5) * 0.4) % 1.0
            r, g, b = colorsys.hsv_to_rgb(shifted_hue, base_hsv[1], star_b)
        else:
            r = color[0] / 255.0 * star_b
            g = color[1] / 255.0 * star_b
            b = color[2] / 255.0 * star_b
            
    matrix[base] = int(r * 255)
    matrix[base+1] = int(g * 255)
    matrix[base+2] = int(b * 255)
